# optimobile.ai

> Mobile analytics (FLIP — Firebase/Crashlytics dominate).
> Open. Transparent. Governed.

## Key facts

- **Domain:** optimobile.ai
- **Tier:** flip
- **MCP endpoint:** https://optimobile.ai/mcp (streamable-HTTP, MCP 1.27.2)
- **A2A Agent Card:** https://optimobile.ai/.well-known/agent-card.json
- **Open source:** https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/optimobile-hive (MIT)
- **Pricing (x402 micro-call):** Free
- **Pricing (SaaS tier):** Freemium
- **Memory mode:** shared
- **Knowledge subgraph scope:** mobile apps, retention metrics, cohorts, funnels

## Tools exposed (MCP)

- (none yet)

## Cross-hive integrations

- (none)

## Brand

- **Palette:** mobile magenta + analytics teal
- **Voice:** Mobile-dev, retention-obsessed, cohort-fluent. Speaks in DAU and ARPU.
